message:
fix(codegen): handle chained exception attribute access

- Support e.__context__.__context__ pattern for chained exceptions
- Generate conditional access: if (e.__context__) |ctx| ctx.__context__ else null
- Check import_aliases for variable existence (e.g., "import numpy as N")

This fixes compilation errors when accessing chained exception attributes
like __context__, __cause__, __traceback__ on optional exception values.
